atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain beginning approximately one week ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain related to moving hay.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient initially thought the pain was from throwing hay.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports sudden onset of pain, sweating, and nausea.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain radiating down to his groin.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports intermittent pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports straining his urine.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is using a strainer to collect urine samples.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies experiencing fever or other systemic symptoms.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient presents with a history of kidney stones, confirmed by CT scan.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician notes tenderness and inflammation over the right kidney.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician notes no rebound tenderness or guarding.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician notes an unremarkable abdomen examination.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes oxycodone 5 mg every 6-8 hours

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes oxycodone 5 mg

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to continue using the urine strainer

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a BMP

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a urinalysis

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a urine culture

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up appointment in 1-2 weeks

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to discuss further treatment options if the stone has not passed within two weeks
